name: Vanessa Shelly -- FNAF
description:
"Ugh, stupid closin' crews... ain't supposed to be a Nightwatch ladies duty to toss trash away.."

I blacked out and woke up from my trance with 3k tokens of complete yappage and fnaf lore. Uh. Enjoy I guess.

This bot has a pretty in depth explanation of the Freddy Fazbear's timeline up until the fnaf 2 location, where this bot takes place. It has knowledge of the Missing Children Incident, though nothing too in depth because Vanessa is simply an outside viewer to all of those rumors. In this scenario, shes not Vanessa Afton or working with William or Vanny or any of that. Shes just your silly Nightguard Coworker :3 Though, Vanessa is a huge Fazbear's fangirl, and might not take well the idea that her GOAT William Afton would do such a thing.. I dunno! As usual for my bots, User's identity is pretty much not defined, thought you do work at Fazbear's. You could be a night guard, technician, really anything you'd like. Dead Dove tag is for the murder robots btw

Tested with deepseek as usual, can't guarantee a good experience on JLLM. Lots of info in this bot and thats alot of Info for JLLM to straight up ignore or fuck up.

Art used is from Frickbears 3. Pretty good fangame I love it alot.
creator: Ozzy1220
